channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Estate agent pole and board cable-tied to Council street name plate in Foxes Dale at jct with Shortlands Rd, Shortlands., 1st April
item.description:
Estate agent pole and board cable-tied to Council street name plate in Foxes Dale at jct with Shortlands Rd, Shortlands. This constitutes the criminal offence act of flyposting JDM estate agent, I think. Seen from a moving vehicle on 30/3/26
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Foxes Dale, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Small silver pen tag on green telecomms cabinet fronting 26, Shortlands Rd, Shortlands, 1st April
item.description:
Small silver pen tag on green telecomms cabinet fronting 26, Shortlands Rd, Shortlands. Seen 30/3/26

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shortlands Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: S17-24 lamp on in Shortlands Rd, Shortlands seen 30/3/26 in bright daylight at 3pm., 1st April
item.description:
S17-24 lamp on in Shortlands Rd, Shortlands seen 30/3/26 in bright daylight at 3pm.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shortlands Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple stickers on lamp column and two other columns or sign poles within 10m, lamp column in Station Rd Penge between the Station building and the footbridge., 1st April
item.description:
Multiple stickers on lamp column and two other columns or sign poles within 10m, lamp column in Station Rd Penge between the Station building and the footbridge. NB at least 3 columns or poles have stickers on within 10 metres.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Station Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping outside churchward house, 1st April
item.description:
I notice some people in a blue minivan fly tipping outside churchward house at around 1.20am.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lorrimore Road, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 25/3/26 - Yet again (about the 5th occurrence) the Give Way sign in Valley Rd at the jct with Shortlands Rd is rotated 90° away from oncoming traffic., 1st April
item.description:
25/3/26 - Yet again (about the 5th occurrence) the Give Way sign in Valley Rd at the jct with Shortlands Rd is rotated 90° away from oncoming traffic. I have previously requested a permanent fix such as putting a pair of nuts and bolts through the sign and post. Yet nothing is done. The sign rotates. I report it. You do a temporary repair by rotating it back. It rotates again. Please do a PERMANENT repair!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Valley Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: New electric vehicle spaces, 1st April
item.description:
Parking has become a lot worse on my road since the introduction of electric charging points. There are now more instances of dangerous illegal parking. There is still public parking available which reduces availability for residents.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woodberry Grove, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Traffic bollards missing/poor road marking, 1st April
item.description:
Bollards missing from both sides of central road traffic island (you can see 1 bollard placed on the pavement). The sight line of the traffic island is very poor - an SL3 bus just drove over the island & you could hear the bang (00.40). Road markings very worn thus not able to define the island

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 173, Penhill Road, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fast gas canister, 1st April
item.description:
Gas canister in gutter outside no. 89
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Belmont Road, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish strewn on the street, 31st March
item.description:
This is a frequent fly tipping location on the corner of Jenner Road and Stoke Newington Common. Today non-recyclable rubbish appears to have been left in recycling bags along with a broken suitcase.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stoke Newington Common, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bed frame, 31st March
item.description:
Someone has tucked it away so no one can see next to the pram sheds.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Simnel Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 31st March
item.description:
See it even affects the vulnerable

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Church Manorway, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Curb stone needs replacing., 31st March
item.description:
Curb stone on Hassop Walk at the junction of Horley Road outside the flats needs replacing.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hassop Walk, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street lamp or working, 31st March
item.description:
The street lamp does not work
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Acorn Close, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping on public footpath between Bury St N9 opposite Walmer house and the A10 Great Cambridge Rd, 31st March
item.description:
Resident reported but nothing done as rubbish, bags, carpet & clothing still there.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bury Street, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole in centre or road, 31st March
item.description:
Large pothole in centre of road. This has already been filled once. Please can this pothole and any others in this road be filled. The road is a mess.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 55, Maiden Erlegh Avenue, Albany Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pothole in centre of road, 31st March
item.description:
There is a large pothole in the centre of the road where Hurst rd meets Eynsford crescent. Cars are swerving to avoid the pothole making it dangerous. This was previously filled and needs filling again.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 331, Hurst Road, Albany Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped Mattress, 31st March
item.description:
A white mattress has been dumped next to the parking area in Bursted woods. Please can it be removed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Erith Road, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped Burnt Ash Hill SE12 0AB, 31st March
item.description:
Rubbish dumped next to electrical recycling bin in Burnt Ash Hill and Glenmere Road next to Lee railway bridge

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Station Approach, Blackheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bollard flyposted with stickers, 31st March
item.description:
Please remove these stickers. old kent road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Old Kent Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
